_____framework
execution success
---
name: Browser Control
description: Load this skill when you need to navigate the web through space.browser
---

Use this skill when the task needs to navigate the web through space.browser.

workflow
- If a new browser window is needed, call `space.browser.open(url)` or `space.browser.create(...)`.
- If an existing browser should change page, call `space.browser.navigate(id, url)`.

guidance
- Prefer `space.browser.open("https://example.com")` when the task needs a fresh browser window.
